---
title: Character Item Roadmap
description: Recommended character builds for various levels in Gladiatus.
---

import CompactBuildDisplay from '@site/src/components/CharacterPlanner/CompactBuildDisplay';

Here is a roadmap of recommended character builds for various levels in Gladiatus. These builds focus on optimizing your character's performance at key milestones.
